## Slow Cooker Pulled Pork

**Source:** [Well Plated](https://www.wellplated.com/slow-cooker-honey-pulled-pork/)
**Prep time:** 15 minutes | **Cook time:** 5–6 hrs (HIGH) or 8–10 hrs (LOW) | **Serves:** 8

---

- 6 oz tomato paste
- 1/3 cup apple cider vinegar

- 1/4 cup water
